items.title: Generated ranking recommendations never claim posts cause a rank outcome
items.precondition: Synthetic ranking analysis containing the exact reviewed post-to-rank recommendation
steps: 1. Pass the generated analysis through sanitizeRankingLlmAnalysis
2. Inspect top_recommendations title, description, and expected_outcome
3. Confirm the post action remains but every causal rank promise is replaced with an honest patient-consideration outcome
items.expected: The central backend guardrail removes the false rank outcome from every recommendation narrative field without dropping the recommendation
items.evidence: src/__tests__/service.ranking-output-guardrails.test.ts — 16/16 passed. Five paraphrased causal claims rewrite, including stay visible, remain top three, support higher rankings, keep standing, and show higher in Maps. Five independent post/rank clause fixtures remain byte-identical.
items.notes: The guard matches a directional causal relationship rather than sentence-level co-occurrence. The recommendation remains present and keeps its one-item priority contract.

items.title: Overview copy keeps rank facts while removing the post-to-rank promise
items.precondition: Synthetic overview text with a real #3 Local Search fact and a generated weekly-post protection claim
steps: 1. Pass the overview through sanitizeRankingLlmAnalysis at search position 3
2. Confirm the factual rank sentence remains
3. Confirm the post action no longer says it protects or improves position, standing, or rank
items.expected: The measured rank remains visible and only the unsupported causal claim changes
items.evidence: src/__tests__/service.ranking-output-guardrails.test.ts — the overview regression preserves 'ranked #3 in Local Search' while removing the weekly-post protection claim; the two-direction corpus also preserves unrelated rank facts and post-engagement clauses byte-for-byte.
items.notes: Synthetic data only; no stored ranking analysis was read or rewritten.

items.title: Prompt and Local Visibility walkthrough state the honest product contract
items.precondition: Updated ranking prompt and wizard configuration
steps: 1. Inspect the prompt rule for post outcomes and true ranking levers
2. Run the focused owner-copy frontend sweep
3. Confirm the wizard no longer promises a fresh Google post due indicator
items.expected: Prompt prevention and frontend static copy agree with the deterministic backend guardrail
items.evidence: Prompt source inspected; frontend ownerCopyHonesty.test.ts plus rankingsDashboard.utils.test.ts passed 15/15; repository search found no shipped wizard copy promising a fresh Google post due
items.notes: The Local Visibility step keeps its existing selector and now describes only the sampled tracked-search position.

items.title: Requested repository verification gates pass
items.precondition: Implementation complete in the isolated PR 155 remediation worktree
steps: 1. Run focused backend and frontend tests
2. Run npx tsc --noEmit and the frontend production build
3. Run npm run check:conventions -- --strict and git diff --check
items.expected: Every requested command exits zero, with exact counts and any advisory output recorded
items.evidence: Focused tests: backend 16/16, frontend 15/15. Full backend suite: 68 files / 512 tests passed. npx tsc --noEmit and backend build: exit 0. Frontend production build: exit 0. npm run check:conventions -- --strict: exit 0 with 0 backend structural violations. git diff --check: exit 0. Alloro Docs production build also passed.
items.notes: Frontend build retained existing third-party eval, mixed static/dynamic import, and large-chunk warnings. Convention output retained existing advisory baselines: one frontend any, one dangerouslySetInnerHTML, test-only token reads, six test raw queries, and tenant-scope heuristics; none are in this patch.

items.title: Alloro Docs parity removes the same post-to-rank claims
items.precondition: Clean linked docs worktree based on the current local alloro-docs HEAD
steps: 1. Replace the Local Rankings replica's weekly-post rank-protection claim with a patient-consideration outcome
2. Replace Reviews & Posts guidance saying fresh posts help ranking
3. Run the docs production build and search the changed files for remaining post/rank causal claims
items.expected: Documentation and the app state the same engagement-only post contract, without absorbing the dirty primary docs checkout
items.evidence: alloro-docs commit 3c6c80f in /Users/rustinedave/Desktop/alloro-docs-worktrees/ranking-copy-honesty updates exactly the two stale files. npm run build passed (2,125 modules); changed-file post/rank causal search returned no match.
items.notes: The original dirty alloro-docs checkout remains untouched. This focused docs commit must be published through the docs repository's normal path alongside the app PR.
